args.subject: Action item from Team Meeting Minutes — coordinate development kickoff
args.body:
Hi David,

Following the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024), your action item is to coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the new project. Please confirm the start date and any blockers, and share a brief plan or next steps. Deadline: 2024-05-20.

Let me know once the kickoff is scheduled or if you need anything from me.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech

args.subject: Action item from Team Meeting Minutes — send agenda to John Mitchell
args.body:
Hi Linda,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024), your action item is to email the file "meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx" to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review. Please send the agenda and confirm when it’s sent. Deadline: 2024-05-21.

If you want, I can attach the file or review the message before you send it. Please confirm when done.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech

args.subject: Action item from Team Meeting Minutes — review sales projections
args.body:
Hi Mark,

According to the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024), your action item is to review the sales projections and provide feedback. Please send your comments or suggested changes. Deadline: 2024-05-19.

Let me know if you need any additional data or context to complete the review.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech
